info.title: ClipN HyperFrames renderer
info.description: Sidecar that renders HTML compositions to video (MP4/MOV/WebM) for the ClipN API.

post.summary: Render an HTML composition to a video
post.description: Substitutes params into compositions/<slug>/index.html, renders via HyperFrames, and streams back the encoded video. On 200 the response body is the raw binary video stream (MP4/MOV/WebM); the composition, format and duration are echoed in the X-Composition / X-Format / X-Duration-Sec response headers. Errors return JSON: 400 (bad request), 422 (render_failed, with stderr_tail), or 500 (internal).

composition.description: Composition slug: brand-intro, brand-outro, hook-overlay, or caption-track-karaoke.

params.description: {{key}} template substitutions injected into the composition HTML.

format.description: Output container. mp4 is opaque; webm/mov carry an alpha channel.

variables.description: Structured variables forwarded to HyperFrames via --variables-file.
